title: Kapelle application config (.claude/kapelle.config.json)
description: Minimal SDLC configuration. Project capabilities and knowledge providers are discovered natively by Claude Code and are not registered here.

artifact_root.description: Project-relative root for durable feature artifacts.

modules.description: Optional module boundaries used only as task context, never for capability routing.

guidance_evidence.description: Whether implementation tasks must report project-guidance evidence. Kapelle does not prescribe how guidance is obtained.

path.description: Path prefix used to provide module context.
